sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85634" key="pomfolughro/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πομφολῠγ-ηρόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n85634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a plaster containing</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πομφόλυξ</foreign> IV, Paul.Age.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:7:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
